OutputDirectoryHint: Leave empty to use source folder
AiEnhancementToggleHint: Enable AI enhancement preprocessing before the original conversion flow.
AiEnhancementDescription: When enabled, supported images are enhanced first and then passed to the existing conversion pipeline.
AiExecutionHint: Auto tries Vulkan first and falls back to CPU mode when the bundled runtime supports it.
AiInputSupportHint: Static PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, BMP, TIFF, and single-frame GIF images can be enhanced. PDFs, PSDs, SVGs, animated GIFs, and other sources continue through the original flow.
AiModelDescription_General: Best for daily photos and screenshots, with stable results for most non-illustration images.
AiModelDescription_Anime: Best for anime, comics, illustrations, and clean line art.
AiModelDescription_Lightweight: Uses less hardware and finishes faster, suitable for older PCs or quick tasks.
AiModelDescription_UpscaylStandard: Recommended for most images, balancing sharpness, detail, and texture.
AiModelDescription_UpscaylLite: Better when speed matters, keeping a clean overall result with shorter processing time.
AiModelDescription_UpscaylHighFidelity: Keeps more small details and texture, suitable for detailed photos and close-ups.
AiModelDescription_UpscaylDigitalArt: Best for posters, concept art, drawings, and stylized artwork.
AiPanelToggleHint: Show the AI settings page entry in the main interface when enabled.
AiSettingsIntelligentFeatureDisclaimer: Different AI models, image content, and runtime environments can affect AI enhancement, matting, erasing, OCR, QR code, and barcode results. The app cannot guarantee perfect processing, absolutely accurate recognition, or output that always matches your expectations. Some results are AI-generated and provided for reference only, so please review them carefully before use.
DropHintDescription:
or click "Import Files" above
(Supported: PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, BMP, GIF, TIFF, ICO, SVG, PDF, PSD, EXE, desktop shortcuts)
PreviewWindowHint: Tip: Left-click the preview image above to open the preview window for a larger view and, when available, use preview-only tools such as AI enhancement preview and AI matting. You can adjust these AI options on the AI Tools page on the right. The current file must be an imported static image in a supported format.
PreviewIntelligentFeatureDisclaimer: AI enhancement, matting, erasing, OCR, QR code, and barcode results can vary by model, source material, and device, so they may not be perfect or fully accurate. Some output is AI-generated and is for reference only. Please verify carefully.
StatusAiEnhancing: AI enhancement in progress. Please wait...
ConversionFeedbackTitle: AI conversion is in progress. Please wait patiently.
ConversionFeedbackDescription: Imvix Pro is still processing your files, and this does not mean the task has failed.
ConversionFeedbackHardwareHint: Processing speed depends on your computer hardware. Faster hardware usually finishes sooner, while lower-end hardware may need more time.
ConversionFeedbackCloseHint: Please keep Imvix Pro open during conversion and do not close the app.
StatusUnexpectedError: Conversion failed due to an unexpected error
LanguageSystemHint: If the system language is not supported, English will be used.
CompressionModeHint: Custom allows manual quality; other modes use preset quality.
PresetNameHint: Type a name to save or overwrite
AlreadyRunningMessage: Imvix Pro is already running. The main window has been brought to the front.
RenameHint: Rename rules are applied to output file names when you start conversion.
TaskAnalysisPipelineAiTemplate: Pipeline: AI batch image enhancement preprocessing -> standard conversion -> {0} output.
TaskAnalysisPipelineAiBypassedTemplate: Pipeline: AI batch image enhancement will not run for this batch, so output will continue through the standard conversion flow -> {0}.
TaskAnalysisAiAllEligibleTemplate: AI batch image enhancement will run before conversion for all {0} inputs in this batch.
TaskAnalysisAiMixedTemplate: AI batch image enhancement will run for {0}/{1} inputs in this batch. The remaining {2} will skip that step and continue through the standard conversion flow.
TaskAnalysisAiNoneEligibleTemplate: No inputs in this batch fall within the AI batch image enhancement support range, so everything will continue through the standard conversion flow.
TaskAnalysisGifExpansionTemplate: {0} GIF input(s) will expand to all frames.
TaskAnalysisPdfExpansionTemplate: {0} PDF input(s) will expand through all-page or split-page rules.
TaskAnalysisWorkloadWithStagesTemplate: Estimated output items: {0}; total processing work items: {1}.
BackgroundFillPlanTemplate: The selected output format does not support transparency, so {0} input(s) will export with background fill.
EstimateDisclaimerAiScale: Size estimates do not include resolution changes introduced by AI batch image enhancement.
EstimateDisclaimerExpandedOutputs: Size estimates are still aggregated statically and do not fully include output growth from multi-page PDFs or multi-frame GIF expansion.
WatchHint: When enabled, new images added to the input folder are converted automatically with the current conversion settings.
WatchHintSavedProfile: Watch mode runs with the saved watch profile. Save again when you want watch tasks to use the latest current settings.
WatchProfileSummaryGifAutoExpand: Watched GIF inputs will automatically expand to all frames before export.
WatchProfileSummaryPdfAutoExpand: Watched PDF inputs will automatically expand to all pages when exporting images.
SaveCurrentWatchProfile: Save current settings as watch profile
WarningTransparencyLoss: Some imported images contain transparency. Converting to JPEG will remove transparent backgrounds.
WarningHighCompression: High compression may noticeably reduce image quality.
WarningGifFramesTooManyTemplate: This GIF contains {0} frames. Exporting every frame to PDF may take a while.
WarningAiUnsupportedInputsTemplate: {0} selected items are not eligible for AI enhancement and will continue through the original conversion flow.
AiModelFallbackToDefaultTemplate: The selected AI model "{0}" is unavailable, so "{1}" will be used automatically.
RuleSummaryAiUnsupportedFallback: Inputs outside the AI batch image enhancement support range will automatically skip that step and continue through the standard conversion flow.
AiScalePerformanceHint: Scaling above 5x may cause performance issues or significantly longer processing time on some devices.
RecommendationReasonPhoto: This image looks like a photo. WEBP or JPEG usually offers a better balance of quality and file size.
RecommendationReasonTransparent: Transparent graphics are usually safer in PNG. WEBP can also work when you need smaller files.
RecommendationReasonIcon: Icon-like images usually work best in PNG, or ICO when you need Windows icon output.
RecommendationReasonVector: Vector artwork is best kept in SVG, or exported to PNG when you need a raster image.
RecommendationReasonGeneric: For general-purpose export, start with WEBP or PNG depending on whether you need transparency.
HistorySummaryTemplate: {0} 路 {1} 路 Total {2} 路 Success {3} 路 Failed {4}
HistorySummaryCanceledTemplate: {0} 路 {1} 路 Processed {2}/{3} before cancellation
HistoryDetailTemplate: Input {0} 路 Estimate {1} 路 Duration {2}
WatchStatusWaiting: Watch mode is ready. Enable it after selecting folders.
WatchStatusInvalidInput: Select an existing input folder for watch mode.
WatchStatusInvalidOutput: Select an output folder for watch mode.
WatchStatusOverlap: Watch input and output folders cannot overlap.
ContactAuthorNote: If you encounter a bug in the current software, please include the full software name, your current version number ({0}), and the bug details in the email to the author.
AboutTagline: A modern image tool for pro batch workflows and local intelligence.
AboutSummary: Imvix Pro focuses on high-volume conversion and local offline intelligence, covering format conversion, compression and resizing, PDF/GIF/PSD workflows, OCR, AI enhancement, and folder automation.
AboutFeatureSectionBody:
1. Imports PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, BMP, GIF, TIFF, ICO, SVG, PDF, PSD, EXE, and LNK, and exports common image formats plus PDF.
2. Includes batch import, folder import, drag-and-drop, presets, rename rules, compression, resizing, background handling, and failure logs.
3. Covers PDF page ranges, GIF frame ranges, PSD composite preview, and EXE/LNK icon extraction workflows.
4. Includes local offline AI enhancement, AI matting, AI inpainting, OCR, QR scanning, and barcode scanning tools.
5. Supports history, file detail analysis, folder watch automation, tray mode, startup, desktop shortcuts, and Windows context menu integration.
AboutTechSectionBody:
1. Built on .NET 10 and Avalonia UI 11 for the desktop core, theming, and multilingual resources.
2. Uses CommunityToolkit.Mvvm to organize state, commands, window coordination, and settings sync.
3. Combines Skia-based graphics, SVG components, Docnet.Core, Magick.NET, and System.Drawing.Common for preview, rendering, and conversion.
4. Uses ONNX Runtime / DirectML, RapidOCR.Net, ZXing.Net, and bundled local runtimes for AI enhancement, recognition, and analysis.
AboutIdeasSectionBody:
1. Keeps the current architecture stable by separating UI, conversion, preview, AI, PDF/PSD, and system integration into focused MVVM services.
2. Uses a unified import-analyze-warn-convert-summarize-log pipeline so images, PDF, GIF, and PSD share a consistent processing flow.
3. Separates batch tasks, presets, watch profiles, and preview tools to balance automation with precise manual control.
4. Stays local-first and offline-first for core AI and recognition features while preserving clear, controllable options for advanced users.
VersionNotesSummary: v2.0.2 focuses on OCR usability refinements and expanded language coverage, improving recognized-text presentation and baseline multilingual support.
VersionNotesFixesBody: 1. Fixed an issue where the copyable text area in the OCR file window did not automatically resize to match the recognized content after recognition completed, causing the text selection field height to shrink unexpectedly.
VersionNotesFeaturesBody: 1. Added baseline OCR support for Vietnamese (vi-VN) and Thai (th-TH).
AiErrorNormalizeUnsupported: The selected file type cannot be prepared for AI enhancement.
AiErrorPrepareTemporaryImage: Unable to prepare a temporary image for AI enhancement.
AiErrorRuntimeFolderMissing: The bundled AI runtime folder is missing. Restore the AI directory and try again.
AiErrorRuntimeExecutableMissing: The bundled AI runtime executable is missing. Restore realesrgan-ncnn-vulkan.exe and try again.
AiErrorModelMissingTemplate: The required AI model '{0}' is missing.
AiErrorLightweightModelMissing: The required lightweight AI model files are missing.
AiErrorCpuModeUnsupported: The bundled AI runtime does not support CPU mode. Switch GPU mode to Auto or update the AI runtime package.
AiErrorModelLoadFailed: The required AI model files could not be loaded.
AiErrorProcessExitCodeTemplate: AI enhancement process failed with exit code {0}.
AiErrorPostResizeFailedTemplate: Failed to resize the AI output to the target scale: {0}
TrayHint: When enabled, closing the window hides Imvix Pro to the system tray. Use the tray icon menu to restore the window or exit the app completely.
KeepRunningInTray: Keep tray icon after closing window
GifPdfOutputDirectoryNote: Output directory: use the selected folder, or the GIF source folder if no folder is set.
WindowsContextMenuToggle: Show "Open with Imvix Pro" in the Windows context menu
WindowsContextMenuHint: Shown only on Windows for PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, BMP, GIF, TIFF, ICO, SVG, PDF, PSD, EXE, and LNK files.
WindowsContextMenuCompatibilityNotice: Only the legacy context menu is supported. On Windows 11, choose "Show more options" first.
WindowsContextMenuUpdateFailed: Failed to update the Windows context menu.
PdfSinglePageHint: This PDF contains only one page, so the current page will be exported directly.
PreviewOcrUnavailable: OCR is currently unavailable for this preview
PreviewOcrUnsupportedPlatform: OCR is currently available only in the Windows build
PreviewQrUnavailable: QR code scanning is currently unavailable for this preview
PreviewQrLinkNotSecure: This link does not use HTTPS
PreviewQrLinksSummarySingle: A link was detected. Click below to expand and view it.
PreviewQrLinksSummaryMultiple: {0} links were detected. Click below to expand and view them.
PreviewBarcodeUnavailable: Barcode scanning is currently unavailable for this preview
PreviewRecognitionProcessingNotice: OCR text recognition, QR code scanning, and barcode scanning all run locally on your device. Processing speed varies with hardware, so longer wait times can be normal. Please be patient.
PreviewAiProcessingNotice: AI enhancement, AI matting, and AI erasing all run locally on your device. Processing speed varies with hardware, so longer wait times can be normal. Please be patient.
PreviewAiCompareHint: Drag the center slider to compare the original image with the AI enhancement preview.
PreviewAiSaved: The AI enhancement preview image has been saved.
PreviewAiFailed: Failed to generate the AI enhancement preview.
BackgroundFillRequiredHint: The selected output format does not support transparency, so this image must be exported with a background color. Choose a color from the palette below.
PdfLockTooltipLocked: Current PDF is locked. Enter the password before continuing.
PdfLockTooltipUnlocked: PDF is unlocked and ready to use.
PdfUnlockFailed: Failed to unlock the PDF. Check the file and password, then try again.
PdfPreviewLockedDescription: Unlock this PDF to view the real content and continue processing.
PdfLockedActionHint: This PDF is still locked, so conversion and analysis are disabled.
WarningPdfLockedSkipTemplate: Detected {0} locked PDF files. They will be skipped if you continue.
PdfLockedSkipReason: PDF is locked and was skipped
AiMattingDescription: Remove backgrounds locally in the preview window with offline ONNX inference.
AiMattingPreviewOnlyHint: This feature only applies to supported imported static images in preview and does not affect batch conversion or file watch tasks.
AiMattingModelDescription_GeneralClassic: Balanced classic U2Net model for most images.
AiMattingModelDescription_GeneralHighAcc: Higher-quality general model for complex edges and subjects.
AiMattingModelDescription_Portrait: Portrait-focused MODNet model optimized for people.
AiMattingModelDescription_Anime: Anime-oriented model for illustrations and character images.
PreviewMattingCompareHint: Drag the center slider to compare the original image and the cutout result.
PreviewMattingGpuFallback: DirectML is unavailable. Switched to CPU inference.
PreviewMattingModelFallbackTemplate: Model "{0}" is unavailable locally. Switched to "{1}".
AiEraserDescription: Remove selected content in the preview window with offline ONNX inference and automatically repair the surrounding area.
AiEraserPreviewOnlyHint: This feature only applies to supported static images in preview and does not affect batch conversion or file watch tasks. The settings below affect new AI eraser results and the default brush size.
AiEraserDefaultBrushSizeHint: Sets the initial brush diameter when entering AI eraser. You can still adjust it temporarily in the preview window.
AiEraserMaskExpansionHint: Expand the selected mask before inference to better cover outlines, fringes, and halos around the target.
AiEraserEdgeBlendHint: Controls how softly the repaired region blends into surrounding pixels. Higher values are smoother; lower values keep harder edges.
PreviewEraserCompareHint: Drag the center slider to compare the original image with the AI eraser result.
ERASER_EMPTY: Draw a mask area before starting AI eraser.
